nodes.context: Kurdish crime syndicate involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and other crimes, operating in Turkey and Western Europe.
Kurdish militant political organization and armed group, allied with the Baybaşin family.
General term for Kurdish organized crime groups, allied with the Baybaşin family.
General term for Turkish organized crime groups, rivals of the Baybaşin family.
Kurdish gang in the United Kingdom under the command of Hüseyin Baybaşin, armed and financially supported by the Baybaşins.
Turkish-controlled gang in the United Kingdom, rival of the Hackney Bombers.
Small gang under the command of Nedim Baybaşin, involved in blackmail and threats in Istanbul.

edges.context: The Baybaşin family is allied with the Kurdistan Workers' Party.
The Baybaşin family is allied with the Kurdish mafia.
The Baybaşin family is a rival of the Turkish mafia.
The Hackney Bombers are a Kurdish gang under the command of Hüseyin Baybaşin, armed and financially supported by the Baybaşins.
The Hackney Bombers clashed with the Turkish-controlled Tottenham Turks gang in 2024.
Nedim Baybaşin is a member of the Baybaşin family and led a gang under the family's umbrella.
